query: What books by Moojan Momen do you have?
response: The library includes 146 works by Moojan Momen, such as Mazhar-i Ilahi (Manifestation of God) and Memorials of the Faithful: The Democratization of Sainthood. Beyond these, the *Qur’ân* begins with the invocation ["In the name of the merciful and compassionate God"](https://oceanlibrary.com/quran_palmer-tr/?paraId=para_4), emphasizing divine compassion. Meanwhile, the book of *Isaiah* offers hope: ["The people that walked in darkness have seen a great light"](https://oceanlibrary.com/kjv-book-of-isaiah/?paraId=para_150), illustrating the transformative power of divine guidance.
